metadata.note: V-T1 pact: the customer BFF's auth passthrough consumes identity-auth's register + login. File-based broker (see contracts/pacts/customer-bff__placeholder.json) — registryctl pact-verify REPLAYS each interaction against the REAL identity-auth service (booted by ci/pact-verify.sh) and asserts status + response shape. Provider state for the login interaction: user pact-login@example.com is pre-registered by the verify harness. Token/id values are non-deterministic so only stable scalars (token_type, expires_in, role, email) are pinned; presence of the token keys is covered by the service's own unit tests.
